title: Blue Dart Global Group is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Blue Dart Global Group is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Warehouse Manager looking for your next big career move? Blue Dart Global Group in Navi Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Blue Dart Global Group:
Blue Dart Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in 3PL Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Dart Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
